metadata.description: AI-native task management plugin for agents and humans

plugins.name: waggle
plugins.description: AI-native task management for agents and humans. Natural language CRUD, real-time HTML views (kanban, list), and autonomous task execution. Requires a provider plugin: waggle-notion, waggle-sqlite, or waggle-turso.

plugins.name: waggle-notion
plugins.description: Notion provider for waggle. Enables team task management via Notion workspace.

plugins.name: waggle-sqlite
plugins.description: SQLite provider for waggle. Local zero-config task management.

plugins.name: waggle-turso
plugins.description: Turso provider for waggle. Remote SQLite for multi-agent coordination.
